items.text: Nivolumab + ipilimumab now funded before surgery for resectable stage IIIB-IV melanoma from 1 May.
Venetoclax + ibrutinib funded as first-line oral treatment for CLL from 1 May; no infusion needed.
Combiprasal (salbutamol + ipratropium nebuliser) funded from 1 May, replacing discontinued Duolin.
Utrogestan (progesterone 100mg) stat dispensing removed from 1 May; maximum supply now one month.
Pirfenidone brand changes from Esbriet to Pirfenidone Sandoz from 1 May; same formulation and dose.
